meta.title: Construction and Bulky Waste Line Case Studies | WEI LAN
meta.description: Browse WEI LAN construction and bulky waste line case studies, including construction waste utilization and compact bulky waste processing references.

bodyHtml:
CONSTRUCTION AND BULKY WASTE LINE

Heavy-duty waste recovery references

Compare current Lion One projects by waste stream, process configuration, and buyer evaluation details before opening a full case page.

Request Reference Package Back to Case Studies

Case List

Current C&D and bulky waste cases

Each row separates the material scenario, process focus, and detail link so buyers can compare related projects quickly.

  1. C&D Waste | 70 t/h Lion One line

    Construction waste utilization line

    Integrated crushing, screening, magnetic separation, and air separation setup for recycled aggregate and material recovery output.

    • Material: construction and decoration waste
    • Focus: recycled aggregate and separated recoverable materials
    • Detail includes: site conditions, equipment scope, buyer background, video
    View case details

  2. Bulky Waste | Compact preprocessing layout

    Compact bulky waste processing layout

    Compact footprint scheme for sites that need crushing, air separation, recyclable recovery, and baled output in one workflow.

    • Material: bulky waste and light mixed waste
    • Focus: size reduction, separation, and baling interface
    • Detail includes: transfer-station workflow, equipment scope, buyer background, video
    View case details
